title: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive, Brush On Super Glue
features: EASY TO SPREAD BRUSH APPLICATOR: 151 Hard As Nails Super Glue, fast applicator brush for perfect surface coverage, bonds in seconds. Perfect for all household, general assembly and repairs.
STRONG & CLEAR BOND: 151 Hard As Nails Super Glue, clear adhesive, apply easily with brush applicator for full coverage on clean, dry, grease free surfaces.
DRIES IN SECONDS: 151 Hard As Nails Super Glue, fast drying in seconds, suitable for metal, wood, porcelain, jewellery, hobbies and crafts.
HOW TO USE: Protect work area at all times. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application. Warning: Protect skin, bonds skin and eyes in seconds.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 20g resealable bottle with brush applicator. Store at room temperature.
